title: Odyssey Lite
description: A simplified version of the OdysseyHUD mod originally made by Dplayend.  This adds the HUDs for compasses and clocks, as well as my own HUDs for smithing templates, discs, and goat horns!
body:
# Odyssey Lite

## Info

A simplified version of the [OdysseyHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/odysseyhud) mod originally made by Dplayend.  This adds the HUDs for compasses and clocks, as well as my own HUDs for smithing templates, discs, and goat horns!

To use this mod, download the mod it and move it to your ```.minecraft/mods``` folder.  Additionally, you will need to install the Fabric API jar for this mod to work.

## Features

HUDs for the following items:

- Clock
	- Shows the time at the top middle of the screen when held in the main hand or offhand.  This HUD will not work if your in The Nether or The End.

- Compass
	- Shows your current location in the top right.  If it is linked to a lodestone, it will also show the location of the lodestone and the dimension in the top left.

- Recovery Compass
	- Shows your current location in the top right.  It will also show the location of your last death and the dimension in the top left.

- Music Discs
	- Shows the music disc's name in the top middle of the screen when held in the main hand or offhand.

- Smithing Templates
	- Shows the smithing templates' name in the top middle of the screen when held in the main hand or offhand.

- Goat Horns
	- Shows the goat horn's instrument name in the top middle of the screen when held in the main hand or offhand.

This mod is also compatible with the Trinkets API.  If a clock, compass, or recovery compass is in the `tools/[compass or clock]` slot (hover over the offhand slot to find it), then the HUD for that item will render.

## Versions

This mod is **Fabric** ONLY.  There is no plan to support Forge.

This mod is available for the following Minecraft versions:

`1.20.x`

`1.21.x`

`26.1`
`26.1.1`
`26.1.2`
`26.2`

## Client and Server Support

This is a client-side only mod.
